C1.note: 1BRS fetched (raw_pdbs/1BRS.pdb), cleanest heterodimer (barnase C + barstar F) selected, ACE/NME capped, propka3 protonation (3 His->HID). tLEaP build.log/leap.log: 'Exiting LEaP: Errors = 0; Warnings = 0; Notes = 0'. Total unperturbed charge -4.000, neutralized with 4 Na+ (charge_check.log), truncated octahedron 12 A pad, ~36500 atoms. Missing crystal side-chain atoms correctly rebuilt; no residues silently dropped.

C2.note: PLAN.md tier-justifies FF (ff14SB Tier 1 Hou 2011/Wang 2019 + Tier 2 RAG p.34, era-matched to GB mbondi2 radii), TIP3P matched partner, Joung-Cheatham Na+ ions, pH 7.0 (Tier 1 Schreiber & Fersht). USER APPROVAL GATE present (approved 2026-06-06). Box padding '12 A octahedron, standard for globular heterodimer' is the one slightly under-justified choice. RAG + literature review used.

C3.note: Full chain min1->min2->heat->equil->equil2->prod all present with mdouts. prod.mdout completed 10 ns at 362 ns/day, normal termination with Final Performance Info. Backbone RMSD 0.97+/-0.16 A (first/last half 0.91/1.03), check_convergence drift 0.12 A < 0.5 A. No blow-up/NaN.

C4.note: MM-PBSA with per-residue decomposition (mmpbsa_decomp.in idecomp=2, dec_verbose=1, print_res=all), correct receptor :1-110 / ligand :111-201 dry topologies via ante-MMPBSA, 91 frames. Hot-spots ranked (hotspots_ranked.csv, FINAL_DECOMP_RESULTS.dat). Independently corroborated with cpptraj hbond/salt-bridge occupancies (sb_*.dat), RMSD/RMSF. Exactly the method+observables the prompt requested, plus alanine-scan comparison (STUDY_REPORT sec 9).

C5.note: Answer-key expected hot spots: Asp39 (barstar), Arg83 (barnase), Arg87 (barnase). Agent's decomposition tops: barstar Asp39 -12.65, barnase Arg83 -11.96, Arg87 -8.15 (also Arg59 -11.0, His102 -5.8, Lys27 -5.1) -- all three expected residues are top-ranked hot-spots. Match to established Schreiber & Fersht 1995 alanine-scan network. NOTE: cited paper PMID 12850155 (Gohlke, Kiel, Case 2003, abstract read via mcp__pubmed) is on Ras-Raf/Ras-RalGDS, NOT barnase-barstar; it establishes the MM-GBSA decomposition+alanine-scan method but contains no barnase-barstar values. Expected residue list is independently confirmed correct, so C5 full credit; key citation system-mismatched.
